title: $8 MILLION Beat Cori Bush — By Just 5 Points
title_alt: $8M Outside Spend Beat Cori Bush — MO-1 Primary Receipt
She Lost By 5 Points After $8M In Outside Ads
Cori Bush Lost MO-1: Here's Who Paid The $8M
description:
Let me tell you what happened in one House district — because the numbers are public, and almost nobody walks through them in plain English.

Missouri's First, August 6, 2024. Outside groups spent about $8 million in one Democratic primary. Cori Bush still lost by only five points. Not a landslide — a sliver. Here's the FEC receipt trail, in 4 minutes.

📋 Full receipt: https://campaignreceipts.com/politician/cori-bush

⏱ Chapters
0:00  $8M in one House district
0:20  Who Bush and Bell are (the real story before the money)
1:00  What "outside money" actually means
1:30  The mailer, the TV, the fine print (United Democracy Project)
2:10  The FEC receipts — independent expenditure filings
3:00  Election night: 51% – 46%
3:20  The punchline: a margin, not a mandate
3:50  What to do before your next primary

📚 Sources
• Federal Election Commission — independent expenditure filings, United Democracy Project & allied committees, MO-1 cycle 2023–24
• Missouri Secretary of State — certified Democratic primary results, August 6, 2024
• KSDK / local news fair-use clips for results & concession

Campaign Receipts is a nonpartisan campaign-finance channel. Same skepticism whichever side the money comes from. Subscribe for more receipts.

#politics #campaignfinance #coribush #wesleybell #fec #factcheck #aipac
